description:
Create a complete 2-bedroom apartment floor plan in LibreCAD. The apartment exterior is 30 feet wide by 22 feet tall with the origin at the southwest corner.

ROOM LAYOUT:
- Living Room (18' x 12'): top-left, from (0,10) to (18,22)
- Kitchen (12' x 12'): top-right, from (18,10) to (30,22)
- Bedroom 1 (12' x 10'): bottom-left, from (0,0) to (12,10)
- Bathroom (6' x 10'): bottom-center, from (12,0) to (18,10)
- Bedroom 2 (12' x 10'): bottom-right, from (18,0) to (30,10)

INTERIOR WALLS: horizontal wall at Y=10 across the full width, vertical wall at X=12 from Y=0 to Y=10, vertical wall at X=18 from Y=0 to Y=22.

Draw all walls as single lines on the WALLS layer (white, color index 7), leaving gaps at every door and window location. Each door is shown as a 90-degree arc swing into the target room on the DOORS layer (red, color index 1). Each window is shown as a pair of short parallel lines in the wall opening on the WINDOWS layer (cyan, color index 4).

DOORS (5 total):
- D1 Entry: north wall centered at X=9, 3 ft wide, swings south into living room
- D2 Living to Kitchen: wall at X=18, centered at Y=16, 3 ft wide, swings east into kitchen
- D3 Living to Bedroom 1: wall at Y=10, centered at X=6, 3 ft wide, swings south into bedroom
- D4 Living to Bathroom: wall at Y=10, centered at X=15, 2 ft 8 in wide, swings south into bathroom
- D5 Living to Bedroom 2: wall at Y=10, centered at X=24, 3 ft wide, swings south into bedroom

WINDOWS (4 total):
- W1: Living room west wall, centered at Y=16, 5 ft wide
- W2: Kitchen east wall, centered at Y=16, 4 ft wide
- W3: Bedroom 1 south wall, centered at X=6, 4 ft wide
- W4: Bedroom 2 east wall, centered at Y=5, 4 ft wide

FIXTURES on FIXTURES layer (green, color index 3):
- Kitchen: counter rectangle along east wall, sink circle, stove rectangle
- Bathroom: bathtub rectangle, toilet rectangle, sink circle

DIMENSIONS on DIMENSIONS layer (yellow, color index 2): add at least 10 linear dimensions covering overall width and height, individual room widths and heights, and representative door or window widths.

LABELS on TEXT layer (magenta, color index 6): label each of the five rooms with its name.

A detailed architectural brief is available at /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/apartment_brief.txt for reference.

Save the completed drawing as /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/apartment_plan.dxf.
